beautifully.

Our App

Pakiza — Pure by design.

One app, crafted with care for the Muslim community worldwide — beautiful content always at hand.

Launching Soon

Pakiza: Islamic Wallpapers & More

A beautifully curated collection of HD Islamic wallpapers, shareable status images, and ringtones & nasheeds — all in one thoughtfully crafted app, free to use.

HD WallpapersStatus ImagesRingtonesNasheedsFree

Coming soon to Google Play Store

Coming Soon

Why Pakiza

Built with purpose.

Every design decision serves the community — beautiful, intentional, and free.

HD Quality

Every wallpaper and status image is carefully selected and optimised for all screen sizes — crisp and vibrant.

Free to Use

Wallpapers, status images, ringtones, and nasheeds — core content is completely free, always.

Community First

Curated specifically for the Muslim community — content that resonates, inspires, and uplifts every day.

Get in Touch

We'd love to hear from you.

Questions, feedback, or feature requests — we reply within 48 hours.
